requested_goal: Create a reusable Skill that can judge and direct cross-border B2B product visuals, product image reconstruction, copywriting, QA scoring and product page generation for private-label structured cabling products.
must_execute_capabilities: classify product category and buyer context
choose product image direction by usage surface
score product page and image quality
produce a one-page confirmation product page

proposed_skill.name: cross-border-product-visual-director
proposed_skill.intended_trigger: Use when product images, catalogue pages, product detail pages, B2B ecommerce visuals, private-label product pages, product image reconstruction, or product visual QA need domain-specific direction for cross-border ecommerce.

search_results.fit_summary: Useful for raster image generation or editing, but it does not define B2B structured-cabling product aesthetics, product-page modules, category rules or QA scoring.
search_results.reason: Keep as an execution helper, not as the directing Skill.

search_results.fit_summary: Useful for polished page implementation and visual QA, but lacks cross-border B2B product image strategy and category-specific product photography guidance.
search_results.reason: Use for page implementation verification after the visual director Skill chooses the product page direction.

search_results.fit_summary: No existing Skill specifically covers product visual direction, product image reconstruction, industrial B2B ecommerce product page copy and QA scoring.
search_results.reason: Existing Skills are execution/general workflow helpers, not a domain-specific product visual director.

search_results.query_or_path: image generation product photography ecommerce product page visual design skill plugin connector
search_results.fit_summary: No exact callable plugin was found for this private-label structured cabling visual director role. Exposed tools are general GitHub/node REPL capabilities, not product visual direction.
search_results.reason: No domain-specific ready plugin is available in the current callable tool list.
search_results.license_or_security_notes: No new plugin requested or installed.

search_results.fit_summary: The project contains templates, product intake and runtime previews, but not a reusable Skill with visual direction rules and QA workflow.
search_results.reason: Reuse the project artifacts as inputs and output location, but create the Skill for future repeatable guidance.

search_results.fit_summary: Provides governance and gate recording, not the product visual director itself.
search_results.reason: Use the gate for evidence and approval, then proceed with Skill creation.

search_results.query_or_path: AI product photography and ecommerce product page tools
search_results.candidate_name: Photoroom, Flair AI, Canva, Adobe Firefly, Pebblely
search_results.fit_summary: These tools can help generate or edit product visuals, but they do not encode this project's private visual rules, cabling product taxonomy, product-page workflow or main-system control requirements.
search_results.reason: Treat as optional execution/reference tools; create a local Skill to drive standards, prompts, QA and product-page decisions.
search_results.license_or_security_notes: External SaaS terms and data handling must be reviewed before uploading real supplier/product assets.

final_decision.reason: Existing skills and SaaS tools can execute pieces, but none provide the reusable local judgment layer for cross-border B2B structured cabling product visuals, copy and QA.
final_decision.approved_next_step: Create C:/Users/zhang/.codex/skills/cross-border-product-visual-director and test it by generating one product page under cross-border-ecommerce-ai-route/runtime.

validation_plan.dry_run_prompt: Use $cross-border-product-visual-director to turn QXKJ-1035 into a private-label B2B product page confirmation draft.
expected_behavior: creates product page copy and modules
